name: PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust
business: Correspondent production activities may include purchasing residential loans, pooling Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac loans into Agency MBS securities and selling or securitizing the loans. We also service mortgages.

exposures.sentence: Rising homeownership costs may negatively impact housing affordability and increase mortgage delinquencies, defaults, and foreclosures.
The average share of borrowers' mortgage payments allocated to property taxes and insurance premiums has been steadily rising in recent years due to inflation, natural disasters and other factors.
Interest rate fluctuations could significantly decrease our results of operations and cash flows and the fair value of our investments.
